# Studio Via Mentana

## What is this site?
A listing website for an elegant studio apartment available for short-term rental in Rome, Italy, via Airbnb.

## Key information
- Property: Studio apartment (monolocale)
- Location: Via Mentana, Rome, Italy — Esquilino neighborhood
- Available on: Airbnb
- Airbnb listing: https://www.airbnb.mx/rooms/1005789413503850183
- Virtual 360 Tour: https://kuula.co/share/collection/7MVhN

## Languages supported
Italian (default), English, Spanish, German

## Sections
- Hero: Embedded interactive 360° virtual tour (Kuula)
- Description: Studio features and amenities
- Location: Neighborhood, nearby points of interest (pizza, coffee, libraries, metro, bus)
- Reviews: Guest reviews and ratings
- CTA: Direct link to Airbnb booking

## Amenities
- Full kitchen
- Refrigerator
- Private bathroom
- High-speed WiFi
- Air conditioning
- Washing machine

## Nearby (Esquilino / Rome center)
- Pizzerias: Pizzarium Bonci, Da Remo, Pizzeria Ai Marmi
- Coffee: Caffè Sant'Eustachio, Bar San Calisto
- Libraries: Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale, Biblioteca di Storia Moderna
- Metro: Line B (Termini), Line A (Repubblica)
- Bus: Line 40 (Historic Center), Line 64 (Vatican)

## Full content
See /llms-full.txt for expanded content.
See /description.md, /location.md, /reviews.md for section-specific markdown.
